name: Coordinate demotion
statement: Raw matrices and raw c_ij entries are coordinate presentations only; compare normalized Jordan-symbol/gauge keys.

name: 2-primary split
statement: Separate 2-primary components before odd-prime or mixed-module comparison.

name: Odd cyclic 2-block
statement: For A(2^k,t), require t odd and normalize by t mod 8 plus Brown invariant.

name: Even rank-2 2-block
statement: Use explicit U/V block tags with exponent 2^k and Brown invariant; do not collapse U and V by rank/order alone.

name: Direct sum symbol
statement: Sort block symbols by exponent/type/oddity and record additive Brown invariant mod 8.

name: Radical rejection
statement: Reject forms with nontrivial radical before gauge classification.

name: Gauge invariance
statement: Generator changes and basis permutations must preserve normalized symbol key.

name: Orthad handoff
statement: T-derived finite modules enter classifier only after transition/cocycle admissibility gates pass.
